text.title: Grafana — Deployment and Provisioning Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: HA serves stale data; one replica writes, others miss.
Cluster destroyed; rebuild takes a week.
antipattern.fix: Move all setup into provisioning/*.yaml in Git.
Migrate to Alloy now; freeze new Agent installs.

antipattern.symptom: Restore fails during incident; data lost.
